---
title: "Opportunities"
---

ForgeLab Carpentries isn't only about learning — it's a pathway from skills to real work.

## From workshops to opportunities

The journey is deliberate:

1. **Learn** — complete hands-on workshops across Foundations, Robotics, and Applied AI.
2. **Verify** — earn micro-credentials through instructor checkout and capstone projects.
3. **Connect** — surface those verified skills to teams hiring for robotics, autonomy, and AI roles
   through the **placements portal**.

The portal matches the evidence you build here — completed tracks, capstones, and credentials —
to concrete openings, so your learning leads somewhere.

## Browse the portal

[**Browse open opportunities →**](https://forge-lab-platform-portal.vercel.app/jobs)

The portal lists open roles in robotics, autonomy, and AI and matches them to the tracks, capstones,
and credentials you've completed here. Talk to your instructors about getting your capstone work
ready to showcase.

## For instructors & partners

If your team is hiring and wants to source from ForgeLab graduates, or you'd like to contribute a
capstone brief tied to a real role, see the
[Capstones & Certification track](https://github.com/FrankAsanteVanLaarhoven/ForgeLabCarpentries/blob/main/curriculum/tracks/capstones-certification.md).
